title: premna perplexans
intro: Premna perplexans is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Indian tulsi or wild basil, which is native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Premna perplexans include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
